| II.BB | [Expanding witness eligibility under BCO 35-1](../inquiries/ga48_2021__ci28.md) | CCB found no constitutional conflict in an overture to broaden the pool of eligible witnesses in disciplinary proceedings under BCO 35-1. | BCO 35-1, BCO 35-6 | not in conflict; Adopted | Overture 41 from Tennessee Valley Presbytery | [ga48_2021 p.465](../markdown/ga48_2021.md#ga48-p465) |

## 49th General Assembly (2022)  ·  `ga49_2022`

| Inquiry | Subject | Synopsis | Provisions | Outcome | From | Minutes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| II.A | [Assistant Pastor standing to file complaints against Sessions](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci01.md) | CCB found an overture allowing assistant pastors to file complaints against Sessions under BCO 22-3 to be in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 22-3, BCO 43-1 | in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 2 from Tennessee Valley Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.419](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p419) |
| II.B | [Suspensions during pending process or delay under BCO 31-10](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci02.md) | CCB found no constitutional conflict in proposed amendments to BCO 31-10 and 33-4 governing suspensions during judicial process or delay. | BCO 31-10, BCO 33-4 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 6 from Nashville Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.420](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p420) |
| II.C | [Suspending judgment during appeal under BCO 42-6](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci03.md) | CCB found no constitutional conflict in an overture to amend BCO 42-6 regarding the suspension of judgment pending an appeal. | BCO 42-6 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 7 from Nashville Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.420](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p420) |
| II.D | [Percentage threshold for original jurisdiction requests under BCO 33-1](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci04.md) | CCB found in conflict an overture from Houston Metro Presbytery establishing a numerical percentage threshold for requesting original jurisdiction under BCO 33-1 and 34-1. | BCO 33-1, BCO 34-1, BCO 11-4, BCO 31-2 | in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 8 from Houston Metro Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.420](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p420) |
| II.E | [Numerical threshold for original jurisdiction requests under BCO 34-1](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci05.md) | CCB found in conflict a Calvary Presbytery overture setting a percentage threshold for original jurisdiction requests, touching BCO 34-1 and 11-4. | BCO 34-1, BCO 11-4, BCO 31-2 | in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 9 from Calvary Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.420](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p420) |
| II.F | [Percentage threshold for calling large-church congregational meetings](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci06.md) | CCB found no constitutional conflict in amending BCO 25-2 to add a new percentage threshold for calling congregational meetings in large churches. | BCO 25-2 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 11 from Korean Capital Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.420](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p420) |
| II.G | [Adding human-sexuality language from ad interim committee to BCO 16](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci07.md) | CCB found no constitutional conflict in an overture incorporating the Ad Interim Committee on Human Sexuality's language as a new paragraph BCO 16-4. | BCO 16-4 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 12 from Hills and Plains Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.421](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p421) |
| II.H | [Restructuring SJC composition by amending BCO 15-4 and RAO 17-1](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci08.md) | CCB found no constitutional conflict in a Westminster Presbytery overture to change the membership composition of the Standing Judicial Commission. | BCO 15-4, RAO 17-1 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 14 from Westminster Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.421](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p421) |
| II.I | [Disqualifying from office men who identify as homosexual](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci09.md) | CCB found no constitutional conflict in an overture to amend BCO 7 disqualifying from ordained office men who identify as homosexual. | BCO 7 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 15 from Westminster Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.421](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p421) |
| II.J | [Requiring annual congregational meeting and financial reporting standards](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci10.md) | CCB found in conflict an overture to amend BCO 25-2 mandating annual congregational meetings and specific financial reporting standards. | BCO 25-2, BCO 29-2, BCO 36-2, BCO 36-3, BCO 36-4, BCO 36-6, BCO 37-4 | in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 16 from TE Ted Lester | [ga49_2022 p.421](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p421) |
| II.K | [Requiring open proceedings for ecclesiastical trials](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci11.md) | An overture proposing to amend BCO 32-3 to mandate open proceedings for trials was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 32-3 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 17 from TE Ted Lester | [ga49_2022 p.422](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p422) |
| II.L | [Stated Clerk's administrative role in processing allegations](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci12.md) | A proposed RAO 3-2 amendment adding Stated Clerk responsibilities for processing allegations was found not in conflict with the BCO. | RAO 3-2 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 18 from Pacific Northwest Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.423](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p423) |
| II.M | [Membership and quorum requirements for presbytery commissions](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci13.md) | A proposed amendment to BCO 15-2 clarifying presbytery commission membership and quorum was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 15-2 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 19 from Northwest Georgia Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.423](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p423) |
| II.N | [Adding qualifications for ordination to BCO 16](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci14.md) | An overture from Northwest Georgia Presbytery proposing a new BCO 16-4 on ordination qualifications was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 16-4 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 20 from Northwest Georgia Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.423](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p423) |
| II.O | [Timing requirements for filing a complaint under BCO 43](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci15.md) | A proposed amendment to BCO 43-2 and 43-3 regarding the timing of filing complaints was found ambiguous and adopted by the CCB. | BCO 43-2, BCO 43-3 | ambiguous; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 21 from Northwest Georgia Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.423](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p423) |
| II.P | [Digital accessibility of statistical data under RAO 3-2](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci16.md) | An overture to amend RAO 3-2.h making statistical data digitally accessible was found not in conflict with the BCO. | RAO 3-2 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 22 from Northwest Georgia Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.423](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p423) |
| II.Q | [Qualifications for ordination added to BCO 16 by Southeast Alabama](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci17.md) | Southeast Alabama Presbytery's overture to add BCO 16-4 on ordination qualifications was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 16-4 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 23 from Southeast Alabama Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.424](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p424) |
| II.R | [Eligibility to submit overtures under RAO 11](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci18.md) | A proposed amendment to RAO 11-2 and 11-10 clarifying who may submit an overture was found not in conflict with the BCO. | RAO 11-2, RAO 11-10 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 24 from Houston Metro Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.424](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p424) |
| II.S | [Clarifying the role of a presbytery commission under BCO 15](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci19.md) | Houston Metro Presbytery's overture to amend BCO 15-1 and 15-3 clarifying a presbytery commission's role was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 15-1, BCO 15-3 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 25 from Houston Metro Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.424](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p424) |
| II.T | [Potomac Presbytery's proposal on presbytery commission role](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci20.md) | Potomac Presbytery's overture to amend BCO 15-1 and 15-3 clarifying a presbytery commission's role was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 15-1, BCO 15-3 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 27 from Potomac Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.424](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p424) |
| II.U | [Chaplain endorsement requirements added to BCO 8-7](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci21.md) | Pittsburgh Presbytery's overture adding chaplain endorsement requirements to BCO 8-7 was found in conflict with the BCO and adopted by the CCB. | BCO 8-7, BCO 11-4, BCO 13-9 | in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 28 from Pittsburgh Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.424](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p424) |
| II.V | [Qualifications for church office added to BCO 16](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci22.md) | Pittsburgh Presbytery's overture proposing a new BCO 16-4 on qualifications for church office was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 16-4 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 29 from Pittsburgh Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.425](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p425) |
| II.W | [Congregational authority to set minimum voting age](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci23.md) | CCB found an overture to allow congregations to restrict voting by age internally inconsistent, vague, and in conflict with existing BCO provisions. | BCO 6-5, BCO 20-3, BCO 25-1, BCO 24-3, BCO 25-7 | internally inconsistent and vague, in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 30 from Pittsburgh Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.425](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p425) |
| II.X | [Proposed additional ordination requirements in BCO 21-4 and 24-1](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci24.md) | CCB advised that Pittsburgh Presbytery's overture adding ordination requirement paragraphs to BCO 21-4 and 24-1 is not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 21-4, BCO 24-1 | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Overture 31 from Pittsburgh Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.426](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p426) |
| II.Y | [Authorizing a virtual meeting protocol in the RAO](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci25.md) | CCB found the Administrative Committee's proposed RAO 10-6 amendment establishing a virtual meeting protocol to be in conflict with the Constitution. | RAO 10-6, RAO 1-1 | in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Proposed RAO Amendment from the Administrative Committee | [ga49_2022 p.426](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p426) |
| III | [Proposed RAO 8-4 amendment and its conformity to constitutional standards](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci26.md) | CCB advised that Tennessee Valley Presbytery's proposed amendment to RAO 8.4 is in order and not in conflict with BCO or RAO standards. | RAO 8-4 | in order and not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Reference from Stated Clerk re Overture 32 from Tennessee Valley Presbytery | [ga49_2022 p.426](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p426) |
| Supplemental II.A | [Seven overtures held over from the 48th to 49th General Assembly](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci27.md) | CCB advised that all seven overtures carried over from the 48th GA, touching discipline, appeals, and related BCO provisions, are not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 38-1, BCO 42-2, BCO 31-10, BCO 33-4, BCO 42-6, BCO 35-5, BCO 32-13, BCO 35-1, BCO 35-6 | not in conflict (all seven); Adopted by the CCB | Overtures 2021-19, 2021-20, 2021-21, 2021-34, 2021-35, 2021-40, 2021-41 from 48th GA (Pacific Northwest and Tennessee Valley Presbyteries) | [ga49_2022 p.428](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p428) |
| Supplemental II.B | [RPR's proposed amendment to RAO 16-4c and constitutional conformity](../inquiries/ga49_2022__ci28.md) | CCB advised that the Review of Presbytery Records Committee's proposed change to RAO 16-4c is not in conflict with the Constitution. | RAO 16-4c | not in conflict; Adopted by the CCB | Proposed change to RAO 16-4c from the Review of Presbytery Records (RPR) Committee | [ga49_2022 p.428](../markdown/ga49_2022.md#ga49-p428) |

## 50th General Assembly (2023)  ·  `ga50_2023`

| Inquiry | Subject | Synopsis | Provisions | Outcome | From | Minutes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| II.A | [Proposed limits on General Assembly debate time under RAO](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci01.md) | CCB unanimously found James River Presbytery's overture to limit GA debate via RAO 14-9.h and 15-8.g not in conflict with the Constitution. | RAO 14-9.h, RAO 15-8.g | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 3 from James River Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.454](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p454) |
| II.B | [Chaplain authority to administer sacraments under BCO 8-6](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci02.md) | CCB unanimously found Tidewater Presbytery's overture to change BCO 8-6 regarding chaplain administration of sacraments to be in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 8-6, BCO 6, BCO 6-1 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 5 from Tidewater Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.455](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p455) |
| II.C | [Requiring criminal background checks for minister and officer candidates](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci03.md) | CCB unanimously found South Texas Presbytery's overture mandating criminal background checks for all minister and officer candidates not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 13-6, BCO 21-4.b, BCO 24-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 6 from South Texas Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.455](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p455) |
| II.D | [Committees of Commissioners reviewing committee and board compliance](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci04.md) | CCB unanimously found Southern New England Presbytery's overture expanding RAO 4-21.d to allow Committees of Commissioners to review compliance policies not in conflict with the Constitution. | RAO 4-21.d | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 7 from Southern New England Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.455](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p455) |
| II.E | [Non-censure suspension of officers during investigation](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci05.md) | The CCB found that a proposed overture to add a non-censure suspension option during investigations (BCO 31-10) conflicts with the BCO as it currently stands. | BCO 31-10, BCO 13-1, BCO 13-2, BCO 43, BCO 11-4 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 8 from Arizona Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.455](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p455) |
| II.F | [Codifying biblical sexuality standard for church officers in BCO 7](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci06.md) | The CCB found that amending BCO 7 to codify the biblical standard for church officers related to human sexuality is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 7 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 9 from Arizona Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.456](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p456) |
| II.G | [Use of professional legal counsel in cases of process](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci07.md) | The CCB found that a proposed amendment to BCO 32-19 clarifying use of professional counsel in disciplinary proceedings conflicts with the existing BCO. | BCO 32-19, BCO 8-9, BCO 13-1 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 10 from Northern New England Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.456](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p456) |
| II.H | [GA commissioners' right to object to SJC decisions](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci08.md) | The CCB found that amending BCO 15-4, 45-1, and 45-4 to allow General Assembly commissioners to register objections to SJC decisions is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 15-4, BCO 45-1, BCO 45-4 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 11 from Platte Valley Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.456](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p456) |
| II.I | [Allowing all persons as witnesses in disciplinary cases](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci09.md) | The CCB found that amending BCO 35-1 and 35-7 to permit all persons (without restriction) to serve as witnesses in cases of process is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 35-1, BCO 35-7 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-0-1 | Overture 13 from Northern California Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.456](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p456) |
| II.J | [Professional counsel in cases of process — scope of participation](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci10.md) | The CCB found that a Northern California Presbytery overture amending BCO 32-19 regarding professional counsel in cases of process conflicts with the existing BCO. | BCO 32-19, BCO 8-9, BCO 13-1 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 14 from Northern California Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.457](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p457) |
| II.K | [Prohibiting women's exhortation, preaching, or teaching in worship](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci11.md) | The CCB found that amending BCO 53 to expressly disallow women from exhorting, preaching, or teaching in corporate worship is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 53, BCO 26-2 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 15 from Session of Bryce Avenue Presbyterian Church, White Rock, New Mexico | [ga50_2023 p.457](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p457) |
| II.L | [Officers' self-identification by biblical sins barred in BCO 7](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci12.md) | The CCB found that amending BCO 7 to prohibit church officers from self-describing by biblical sins (e.g., 'gay Christian') is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 7 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 16 from Catawba Valley Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.457](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p457) |
| II.M | [BCO 7 qualifications limited to biological men who hold office](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci13.md) | The CCB found that an overture amending BCO 7 regarding the requirement that church officers be men is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 7 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 17 from Session of Meadowview Reformed Presbyterian Church, Lexington, NC | [ga50_2023 p.457](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p457) |
| II.N | [Specifying causes and processes for original jurisdiction requests](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci14.md) | The CCB found that amending BCO 33-1 and 34-1 to specify the causes and processes for requesting original jurisdiction is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 33-1, BCO 34-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 21 from Session of First Presbyterian Church, Montgomery, Alabama | [ga50_2023 p.458](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p458) |
| II.O | [When minority reports are permitted under the RAO](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci15.md) | The CCB found that amending RAO 8-4.h, 17-1, and 19-2 to specify when minority reports are permitted in Assembly proceedings is not in conflict with the BCO. | RAO 8-4.h, RAO 17-1, RAO 19-2 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 22 from Session of First Presbyterian Church, Montgomery, Alabama | [ga50_2023 p.458](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p458) |
| II.P | [Officers required to conform to biblical chastity in self-description](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci16.md) | The CCB found that amending BCO 8-2 and 9-3 to require officers to conform to biblical standards of chastity and sexual purity in self-description is not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 8-2, BCO 9-3 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 23 from Mississippi Valley Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.458](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p458) |
| II.Q | [Elder responsibilities and human sexuality language in BCO 8-3](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci17.md) | The CCB found no constitutional conflict in amending BCO 8-3 to incorporate AIC Report language on human sexuality for elder responsibilities. | BCO 8-3 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 24 from Chesapeake Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.458](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p458) |
| II.R | [Expedited, conflict-free investigations for cases with victims or moral failure](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci18.md) | The CCB found an overture to require expedited, conflict-free judicial investigations in BCO 31 to be in constitutional conflict, yet adopted it 8-0-0. | BCO 31, BCO 31-2, WCF 23, Preliminary Principle 1 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 25 from Arizona Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.458](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p458) |
| II.S | [Restricting honorary titles for unordained persons under BCO 7-3](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci19.md) | The CCB found no constitutional conflict in amending BCO 7-3 to regulate the titling of unordained individuals. | BCO 7-3 | not in conflict; Adopted 6-1-1 | Overture 26 from Northwest Georgia Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.459](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p459) |
| II.T | [Confessions and rights of offended parties in BCO 38-1](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci20.md) | The CCB found no constitutional conflict in amending BCO 38-1 to address confessions in relation to offended parties. | BCO 38-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-0-1 | Overture 27 from Pacific Northwest Presbytery | [ga50_2023 p.459](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p459) |

| Supplemental II.2 | [Recording ministerial call arrangements in presbytery records under RAO 16-3.e.6](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci23.md) | The CCB found a proposed CRPR amendment on recording ministerial call arrangements in presbytery records to be not in constitutional conflict. | RAO 16-3.e.6 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-0-0 | Proposed amendment to RAO 16-3.e.6 from CRPR (Committee on Review of Presbytery Records) | [ga50_2023 p.461](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p461) |
| Supplemental II.3 | [CRPR review scope for presbyteries with pending judicial cases](../inquiries/ga50_2023__ci24.md) | The CCB found a proposed CRPR amendment addressing judicial cases and CRPR review under RAO 16-3.e.8 to be not in constitutional conflict. | RAO 16-3.e.8, BCO 40-3 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-0-0 | Proposed amendment to RAO 16-3.e.8 from CRPR (Committee on Review of Presbytery Records) | [ga50_2023 p.461](../markdown/ga50_2023.md#ga50-p461) |

## 51st General Assembly (2024)  ·  `ga51_2024`

| Inquiry | Subject | Synopsis | Provisions | Outcome | From | Minutes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| II.A | [Witness eligibility standards in BCO 35-1 and 35-8](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci01.md) | The CCB found an overture to amend witness eligibility provisions in BCO 35-1 and 35-8 to be constitutionally vague. | BCO 35-1, BCO 35-8 | constitutionally vague; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 1 from Piedmont Triad Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.223](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p223) |
| II.B | [Clarity in transfers of ordination between presbyteries under BCO 13-6](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci02.md) | The CCB found no constitutional conflict in amending BCO 13-6 to provide greater clarity in the process for transferring ordination between presbyteries. | BCO 13-6 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 2 from Northern California Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.224](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p224) |
| II.C | [Granting constitutional status to BCO 53 on preaching](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci03.md) | The CCB found no constitutional conflict in an overture to grant constitutional status to BCO 53 governing the ministry of preaching. | BCO 53, BCO 26-2 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 3 from Pee Dee Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.224](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p224) |
| II.D | [Study committee to review and reform judicial rules](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci04.md) | CCB found this overture in conflict (with existing provisions), yet adopted 8-0-0, proposing a study committee to examine changes to PCA judicial rules under RAO 9-3. | RAO 9-3 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 4 from Central Indiana Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.224](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p224) |
| II.E | [Mandatory background checks as condition for church office](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci05.md) | Overture to amend BCO 13-6 requiring background checks for church officers was found in conflict with existing BCO provisions but adopted 6-1-1. | WCF 23.3, BCO Preliminary Principle II, BCO 13-6 | in conflict; Adopted 6-1-1 | Overture 6 from the Presbytery of Susquehanna Valley | [ga51_2024 p.224](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p224) |
| II.F | [Clarifying the amendment process for RAO provisions](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci06.md) | Overture to amend RAO 11-5 to clarify how RAO amendments are made was found not in conflict and adopted 6-1-1. | RAO 11-5 | not in conflict; Adopted 6-1-1 | Overture 7 from Ascension Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.225](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p225) |
| II.G | [Adding Great Commission language to officer qualifications](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci07.md) | Overture to add a Great Commission requirement to BCO 12-5 was found not in conflict with the BCO and adopted unanimously 8-0-0. | BCO 12-5 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 9 from Metro Atlanta Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.225](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p225) |
| II.H | [Presbytery care obligations for teaching elders under BCO 13-9](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci08.md) | Overture to amend BCO 13-9 to add presbytery care requirements for teaching elders was found not in conflict and adopted 8-0-0. | BCO 13-9 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 10 from Metro Atlanta Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.225](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p225) |
| II.I | [Enrollment data reporting requirement for PCA higher education institutions](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci09.md) | Overture to amend RAO 4-21.d requiring enrollment data from PCA-affiliated higher education institutions was found not in conflict and adopted 8-0-0. | RAO 4-21.d | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 14 from the Presbytery of Northwest Georgia | [ga51_2024 p.225](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p225) |
| II.J | [Restricting ordination to biological males under BCO 7-2](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci10.md) | Overture to amend BCO 7-2 explicitly limiting ordination to biological males was found not in conflict with the BCO and adopted unanimously 8-0-0. | BCO 7-2 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 15 from the Session of West End Presbyterian Church, Hopewell, Virginia | [ga51_2024 p.225](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p225) |
| II.K | [Background checks required for ordination and church office](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci11.md) | Overture to amend BCO 13-6, 21-4, and 24-1 to mandate background checks for church officers was found not in conflict and adopted 8-0-0. | BCO 13-6, BCO 21-4, BCO 24-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 16 from Warrior Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.225](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p225) |
| II.L | [Parallel overture on background checks for church office holders](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci12.md) | A second overture (from Ohio Presbytery) to amend BCO 13-6, 21-4, and 24-1 requiring background checks was also found not in conflict and adopted 8-0-0. | BCO 13-6, BCO 21-4, BCO 24-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 17 from The Ohio Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.226](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p226) |
| II.M | [Witness eligibility standards in church judicial proceedings](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci13.md) | Overture to amend BCO 35-1 and 35-8 regarding who may serve as a witness in judicial cases was found not in conflict and adopted 5-1-2. | BCO 35-1, BCO 35-8 | not in conflict; Adopted 5-1-2 | Overture 18 from The Ohio Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.226](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p226) |
| II.N | [Allowing venue change in church judicial proceedings](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci14.md) | Overture to amend BCO 41 permitting venue changes in judicial cases was found in conflict with existing BCO provisions but nonetheless adopted 8-0-0. | BCO 39-1, BCO 11-4, BCO 13-1, BCO 13-9, BCO preliminary principle vii, BCO 31-2 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 19 from the Session of Fountain Square Presbyterian Church, Indianapolis, Indiana | [ga51_2024 p.226](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p226) |
| II.O | [Systematic overhaul of BCO judicial process chapters 31, 32, and 35](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci15.md) | Overture proposing broad changes to BCO 31, 32, and 35 governing judicial process was found in grave conflict with multiple BCO provisions but adopted 8-0-0. | BCO 13-1, BCO 13-2, BCO 43, BCO 35-4, BCO Preliminary Principle 8, BCO 31-2, BCO 8-10, BCO 32-7 | in grave conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 20 from the Session of Fountain Square Presbyterian Church, Indianapolis, Indiana | [ga51_2024 p.227](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p227) |
| II.P | [Prohibition against interlocutory appeal by complaint under BCO 43](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci16.md) | The CCB found the proposed overture to change BCO 43-1's prohibition against interlocutory appeals by complaint to be internally inconsistent and in conflict with existing BCO provisions. | BCO 43-1, BCO 43-2 | internally inconsistent and in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 21 from Central Indiana Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.227](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p227) |
| II.Q | [Clarifying teaching elder presbytery membership in BCO 13-2](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci17.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 13-2 clarifying teaching elder presbytery membership not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 13-2 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 22 from the South Florida Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.227](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p227) |
| II.R | [Mandatory background checks for church office under BCO 13-6](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci18.md) | The CCB found a proposed overture requiring background checks for church office to be in conflict with the BCO and WCF Preliminary Principles. | WCF 23.3, BCO Preliminary Principle II, BCO 13-6 | in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 23 from Missouri Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.228](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p228) |
| II.S | [Background checks for officers under BCO 13-6, 21-4, and 24-1](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci19.md) | The CCB found a South Texas Presbytery overture requiring background checks for church office not in conflict with BCO 13-6, 21-4, and 24-1. | BCO 13-6, BCO 21-4, BCO 24-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 24 from the Presbytery of South Texas | [ga51_2024 p.228](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p228) |
| II.T | [Expanding who may assist in a BCO 31-2 investigation](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci20.md) | The CCB found a proposed amendment expanding who may assist in a judicial investigation under BCO 31-2 not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 31-2 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-1-0 | Overture 25 from Tennessee Valley Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.228](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p228) |
| II.U | [Expanding accused persons' representation before church courts](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci21.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 32-19 broadening representation of accused persons before church courts not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 32-19 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 26 from Tennessee Valley Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.228](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p228) |
| II.V | [Examining transferring ministers' character and family management](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci22.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 13-6 adding personal character and family management to examinations of transferring ministers not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 13-6 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 27 from Potomac Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.229](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p229) |
| II.W | [Resolving conflict between RAO 16-6 and BCO 40-5](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci23.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to RAO 16-6.c.1 to eliminate its conflict with BCO 40-5 not itself in conflict with the BCO. | RAO 16-6.c.1, BCO 40-5 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 28 from New Jersey Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.229](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p229) |
| II.X | [BCO 53 amendment restricting preaching exclusively to men](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci24.md) | The CCB found the proposed addition to BCO 53 to ensure only men preach in conflict with existing BCO provisions, adopted by a divided vote. | BCO 53 | in conflict; Adopted 3-2-3 | Overture 29 from the Session of Bryce Avenue Presbyterian Church, White Rock, New Mexico | [ga51_2024 p.229](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p229) |
| II.Y | [Presbytery exit interview prior to dissolution of a minister's call](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci25.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 23-1 requiring a presbytery exit interview before dissolution of a call not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 23-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 30 from Lowcountry Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.229](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p229) |
| II.Z | [Changes in permanent committee and agency policy under BCO 14-1](../inquiries/ga51_2024__ci26.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 14-1 regarding changes in permanent committee and agency policy not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 14-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 31 from New River Presbytery | [ga51_2024 p.229](../markdown/ga51_2024.md#ga51-p229) |

## 52nd General Assembly (2025)  ·  `ga52_2025`

| Inquiry | Subject | Synopsis | Provisions | Outcome | From | Minutes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| II.A | [Court's authority to investigate before filing charges under BCO 32-2](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci01.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 32-2 clarifying a court's investigative authority both in conflict with and ambiguous in relation to the BCO. | BCO 32-2, BCO 29-1, BCO 32-2.e, BCO 32-2.f, BCO 31-9, BCO 31-6, BCO 31-7 | in conflict (and ambiguous); Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 1 from Northern New England Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.251](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p251) |
| II.B | [Full constitutional status for BCO chapters 60–63 on church property](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci02.md) | The CCB found the overture granting BCO 60–63 full constitutional status not in conflict with the Constitution, adopted 7-1-0. | BCO 60, BCO 61, BCO 62, BCO 63 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-1-0 | Overture 5 from Calvary Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.252](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p252) |
| II.C | [Flexibility for candidates applying to come under presbytery care](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci03.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 18-2 allowing flexible application procedures for candidates not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 18-2 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 6 from Rocky Mountain Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.252](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p252) |
| II.D | [Advisors and original jurisdiction in process against a teaching elder](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci04.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 34-1 regarding advisors and original jurisdiction in TE disciplinary process not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 34-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-0-1 | Overture 7 from the Missouri Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.253](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p253) |
| II.E | [Requiring ruling elders and deacons to state confessional differences at ordination](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci05.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 24-1 requiring REs and deacons to disclose confessional differences not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 24-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 8 from the Nashville Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.253](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p253) |
| II.F | [Assembly committee and agency members as non-voting advisors under BCO 14-1](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci06.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment making AC members from committees and agencies non-voting advisory members not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 14-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 9 from the James River Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.253](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p253) |
| II.G | [Congregational consent requirement for calling assistant pastors under BCO 22](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci07.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment affirming congregational consent for assistant pastors ambiguous, as it did not address how current assistant pastors would be treated upon adoption. | BCO 22 | ambiguous (does not address treatment of current Assistant Pastors upon adoption); Adopted 7-0-1 | Overture 10 from the Central Florida Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.253](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p253) |
| II.H | [Restricting distribution of the Lord's Supper to ordained officers](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci08.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 58-5 limiting Lord's Supper distribution to officers not in conflict with the Constitution, adopted 8-0-0. | BCO 58-5 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 12 from Providence Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.253](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p253) |
| II.I | [Limiting congregational voting to members in good standing under BCO 25-1](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci09.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment consistent with current BCO language but noted it did not resolve a possible conflict with BCO 25-7 and 25-11. | BCO 25-1, BCO 20-3, BCO 24-3, BCO 25-7, BCO 25-11 | consistent with current BCO language but does not address possible conflict with BCO 25-7 and 25-11; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 13 from the Great Lakes Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.253](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p253) |
| II.J | [Court's permissible interactions with an offended party under BCO 38-1](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci10.md) | The CCB found the proposed amendment to BCO 38-1 specifying ways a court may interact with an offended party not in conflict with the Constitution. | BCO 38-1 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 14 from the Great Lakes Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.254](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p254) |
| II.K | [Definite suspension from office language added to BCO 36-4](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci11.md) | Proposed amendment to BCO 36-4 adding definite suspension from office language was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 36-4 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Overture 15 from the Presbytery of the Mississippi Valley | [ga52_2025 p.254](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p254) |

| II.O | [Supplemental judges permitted for session-level disciplinary trials](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci15.md) | Proposed amendment to BCO 41-3 allowing supplemental judges for a session trial was found not in conflict with the BCO. | BCO 41-3 | not in conflict; Adopted 7-0-1 | Overture 23 from the Pacific Northwest Presbytery | [ga52_2025 p.255](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p255) |

| VII | [SJC proposed amendment to RAO 17-3](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci33.md) | The CCB found the SJC's proposed amendment to RAO 17-3 to be not in conflict with the BCO, and the Assembly adopted it unanimously. | RAO 17-3 | not in conflict; Adopted 8-0-0 | Proposed Amendment to the RAO from the Standing Judicial Commission | [ga52_2025 p.261](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p261) |

| Second Supplemental II.C | [CRPR amendment inserting new RAO 16-3.e subsection not in conflict](../inquiries/ga52_2025__ci38.md) | The CCB found CRPR Recommendation 11, inserting a new subsection 6 into RAO 16-3.e and renumbering, not in constitutional conflict. | RAO 16-3.e, RAO 8-2.b.3 | not in conflict; Adopted 6-0-0 | CRPR Recommendation 11 (proposed amendment to RAO 16-3.e) | [ga52_2025 p.266](../markdown/ga52_2025.md#ga52-p266) |
